TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tmmyan yaya maku ga baq balay kbalay na syang tmmyan, t'aring saku laqi cipoq ga knita maku knalay na zyaw qani, baha hmswa pi! blaq yan niqun la shya balay nniqun uzi, nanu yasa aring ku laqi cipoq ga t'aring saku t'qbaq uzi la. nanu ma yaya mu mha: si ga qnzyaq na kniril tayal ga cbaqun misu qoyat su balay ay! nanu lozi ma;mqilang na laqi kneril ga ini qbaq nanu zyaw ru ini nbah qbaq mqyanux babaw nya uzi. hiya ga ,
S.PHON: tmmjan jaja maku ɣa βaq βalaj kβalaj na s~ɕjaŋ tmmjan, tʔariŋ s~ɕaku laqi ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa knita maku knalaj na zjaw qani, βaħa ħms~ɕwa pi! βlaq jan niqun la s~ɕħja βalaj nniqun uzi, nanu jas~ɕa ariŋ ku laqi ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa tʔariŋ s~ɕaku tʔqβaq uzi la. nanu ma jaja mu mħa: s~ɕi ɣa qnzjaq na kniril tajal ɣa ʦ~ʨβaqun mis~ɕu qojat s~ɕu βalaj aj! nanu lozi ma;mqilaŋ na laqi kneril ɣa ini qβaq nanu zjaw ru ini nβaħ qβaq mqjanux βaβaw nja uzi. ħija ɣa ,
S.FORM: tmmyan yaya maku ga baq balay kbalay na syang tmmyan, t'aring saku laqi cipoq ga knita maku knalay na zyaw qani, baha hmswa pi! blaq yan niqun la shya balay nniqun uzi, nanu yasa aring ku laqi cipoq ga t'aring saku t'qbaq uzi la. nanu ma yaya mu mha: si ga qnzyaq na kniril tayal ga cbaqun misu qoyat su balay ay! nanu lozi ma;mqilang na laqi kneril ga ini qbaq nanu zyaw ru ini nbah qbaq mqyanux babaw nya uzi. hiya ga ,
S.PHON: tmmjan jaja maku ɣa βaq βalaj kβalaj na s~ɕjaŋ tmmjan, tʔariŋ s~ɕaku laqi ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa knita maku knalaj na zjaw qani, βaħa ħms~ɕwa pi! βlaq jan niqun la s~ɕħja βalaj nniqun uzi, nanu jas~ɕa ariŋ ku laqi ʦ~ʨipoq ɣa tʔariŋ s~ɕaku tʔqβaq uzi la. nanu ma jaja mu mħa: s~ɕi ɣa qnzjaq na kniril tajal ɣa ʦ~ʨβaqun mis~ɕu qojat s~ɕu βalaj aj! nanu lozi ma;mqilaŋ na laqi kneril ɣa ini qβaq nanu zjaw ru ini nβaħ qβaq mqjanux βaβaw nja uzi. ħija ɣa ,
